title: Crepidium bispiriferum
taxonomy: Crepidium bispiriferum is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Crepidium, which is part of the subtribe Cranichidinae. The subtribe Cranichidinae is further classified under the tribe Cranichideae. Within the family Orchidaceae, Crepidium bispiriferum is also classified under the order Asparagales. This classification helps to organize and understand the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
